plugins.name: trading-assistant
plugins.description: Personal US equity and options trading assistant — daily market pulse, options scanning, stock picks, and deep-dive trade setups. No API keys required.

plugins.name: scrum-master
plugins.description: Personal scrum master and sprint board — a live local web app for managing daily tasks with rolling day view, completion tracking, and auto-rollover of incomplete items.

plugins.name: performance-review
plugins.description: Generate a comprehensive, narrative-driven performance review from your GitHub contributions — PRs, commits, and code reviews analyzed across all repos and orgs, synthesized into a polished markdown + HTML report.

plugins.name: meal-planner
plugins.description: Weekly family meal planner — generates a personalized weekly meal plan with separate lunch options for Saloni and the family, drawing from a curated list of Indian, Mexican, Italian, Mediterranean, Asian, and fusion meals.

plugins.name: api-lite
plugins.description: Local Postman replacement — a lightweight HTTP client that runs entirely on your machine. Import Postman collections, send requests with auth and env variables, and view syntax-highlighted responses. No cloud sync, no account required.
